label: Years of Documented Human Presence
source: Israel Antiquities Authority; Belmaker et al., Nature (Ubeidiya studies)
delta: Oldest known hominid site outside Africa
deltaNote: Ubeidiya (Jordan Valley) yielded Homo erectus fossils and Acheulean tools dated ~1.5 Ma

label: Dead Sea Scrolls Manuscripts Identified
source: Leon Levy Dead Sea Scrolls Digital Library / IAA
deltaNote: Oldest known biblical manuscripts, some dating to 3rd century BCE

label: Age of Jericho (World's Oldest Inhabited City)
source: Kenyon excavations; British School of Archaeology in Jerusalem
contestNote: Scholarly debate over definition of 'city'; some prefer 'proto-urban settlement' for pre-pottery Neolithic phases before ~7000 BCE

label: Years Since First Temple Constructed (trad.)
source: I Kings 6; Cambridge Ancient History Vol. IV
contestNote: No confirmed direct archaeological remains of Solomon's Temple; biblical date ~960 BCE; Israeli excavations below Temple Mount prohibited by Waqf authority

label: Major Documented Historical Periods
source: Compiled: IAA, UNESCO, Cambridge Ancient History, Oxford Biblical Studies
delta: Acheulean → Natufian → Bronze Age → Iron Age → Persian → Hellenistic → Roman → Byzantine → Islamic → Crusader → Mamluk → Ottoman → Modern
